top_signals.title: Russia threatens escalation after Ukraine hits Moscow with largest-ever drone attack
top_signals.summary: Russia has pledged to carry out frequent and "massive group strikes" against Ukraine shortly after Kyiv launched a barrage of drones on Moscow.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Microsoft found malware that hijacks crypto wallets and spreads through USB sticks
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Gov. Ueda has been discharged from hospital, BOJ says
top_signals.summary: Ueda, 74, was hospitalized on June 9 for treatment of a liver cyst infection and didn't attend a policy meeting earlier this week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
